name: SwingScape Indoor Golf
about: SwingScape Indoor Golf is a private golf simulator venue located in Missoula, Montana. The facility operates on a members-only basis and features a single, private simulator bay that is exclusively available to members during their booked tee times. Open 24 hours a day, the venue provides an environment for members to practice their swing, play a round with friends, or improve their game using state-of-the-art technology, regardless of weather conditions. The experience is centered on a Trackman 4 launch monitor system, which is used by PGA professionals.
why_golfers_like_it: Complete privacy during your session with exclusive access to the single bay
Access to the Trackman 4 launch monitor, the same technology used by PGA professionals
24/7 access for ultimate flexibility in scheduling practice or play
Ability to bring guests at no additional cost

food_and_drink.notes: Not mentioned if external food is allowed.
Not mentioned; BYOB status unknown but no full bar indicated.

simulator_hardware.notes: Single simulator bay equipped with Trackman 4 launch monitor, the same technology used by PGA golfers.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, extra clubs and balls are provided for you and your guests to use.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: It is not explicitly stated whether external food or drinks are permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required to play 18 holes is not specified on the website.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Children may access the facility, but they must be accompanied by a member who is 18 or older.
